Butter Bar Studio

A hands-on ceramic experience celebrating Josie Maran's iconic Whipped Argan Oil Body Butter — where attendees designed custom butter dishes and soaked in the ritual of buttery-soft skin.

Two Faced Ceramic Studio

April 14, 2026
Design Evolution

The Invitation

Three rounds of exploration — from hand-drawn illustration to the final butter-forward design.

V1 — Hand-drawn illustrations with a playful, graphic approach and red wavy border.
V2 — A shift toward an artsy, ceramic-inspired mood to complement the venue.
Final — The butter takes center stage, leading with the product and the sensory experience.

Vinyl graphics, branded collateral, and environmental design — concept vs. execution.

Josie Maran — Butter Bar Studio
